title: Principe Calibration Dataset
description: Schema for a single calibration dataset ingested by EP-09 (Calibration Registry). Aggregate distributions only — never individual respondent rows.

sample_size.description: Total respondents or observations in the underlying study

region_coverage.description: Which Principe regional strata this dataset informs

license_status.description: Compliance posture for use in Principe's calibration registry

methodology_notes.description: How the underlying study was conducted; relevant biases or scope notes

distributions.description: One entry per question category this dataset informs

question_category.description: Stable category key. Used by Statistician to map a hypothesis to reference distributions.

kind.description: Distribution = multi-bucket; scalar = single percentage / value

value.description: For scalar kind: the value (0-1 for percentages or absolute number for counts)

distribution.description: For distribution kind: bucket name → proportion (must sum to ≤ 1.0)

delta_yoy.description: Year-over-year change, if reported. Positive = increase.

context.description: Source-quoted context: the exact phrasing or framing from the underlying report
